sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the player position and box count after moving to [3, 15].

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"Player at: {n['boundary']}")
        break
box_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8)
print(f"Boxes remaining: {box_count}")
# List remaining boxes
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        b = n['boundary']
        cr = (b[0][0] + b[2][0]) // 2
        cc = (b[0][1] + b[2][1]) // 2
        print(f"  Box at [{cr},{cc}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
